experiments: R5.1 single-arm DeLong CI on contrast-only AUCs
history.note: arm_c contrast-only AUC = 0.8391 [0.7527, 0.9255] (DeLong CI excludes 0.5). Paired DeLong vs arm_b deferred to Round 6 due to radiomics filter mismatch (arm_b 92 cases vs arm_c 189). Codex review pending — will fire on next cron tick.

delta_since_round3: Within-nonPH protocol AUC with bootstrap CI (R4.1): v2 per-structure volumes LR=0.529 [0.43, 0.63], straddles chance
Skeleton-length HiPaS retry (R4.2): T2 confirmed (ρ=-0.65 contrast), T1 still opposite (PH median 5300 > nonPH 3902)
Reproducibility surface: REPRODUCE.md, environment.yml, requirements-local.lock.txt, cache_provenance.py
must_fix_before_round5: Per-case OOF probability dumps + paired DeLong on a declared primary endpoint
Protocol-decoding on EXACT GCN inputs + embeddings within nonPH only
TEASAR parameter sensitivity sweep + quantitative coverage metrics; diagnose T1 direction mismatch
GCN-level exclusion sensitivity with placeholder cases (degraded graphs)
Locked reproducibility: env lock + verified kimimaro version + git_sha + teasar_params in each pkl
minimum_to_reach_8_of_10: Single declared protocol-matched primary endpoint (contrast-only arm_b disease AUC)
Per-case OOF dumps + paired DeLong for that primary delta
Within-nonPH protocol decoding on actual GCN features + embeddings, with CIs
TEASAR sensitivity + QC metrics + T1 mismatch diagnosis
history.reviewer_notes_for_memory: Round 4 defined the right confound test (within-nonPH protocol decoding with CIs) and added robustness artifacts, but central top-venue blockers remain: no case-level paired DeLong, no within-nonPH protocol-decoding on actual GCN inputs/embeddings, no TEASAR sensitivity, T1 skeleton-length direction still opposite HiPaS.

running_gpu_jobs.task: arm_b + arm_c contrast-only with per-case prob dump

next_round_plan: Round 5 will consume the GPU1 prob dumps to compute paired DeLong on arm_c − arm_b contrast-only (primary endpoint). Additionally: TEASAR sensitivity sweep (scale in {0.8,1.0,1.5}, const in {2,5,10}) on 20 cases via remote; GCN-level exclusion sensitivity (include 27 placeholders with zeroed vessel graphs); env lock via `conda env export --no-builds > environment.lock.yml` on remote.
